zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Rogers於1592年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾維根時，她的父親Knight Richard Rogers II20歲，母親Sarah Barton22歲。她於1618年與Roger Crooke在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1644年8月21日在英國英格蘭倫敦布倫登享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Rogers于1592年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾維根时，她的父亲Knight Richard Rogers II20岁，母亲Sarah Barton22岁。她于1618年与Roger Crooke在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1644年8月21日在英国英格兰倫敦布倫登享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rogers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Roger , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí (see Rorie ).

History: Thomas Rogers (c. 1587–1621), born in London, England, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who sailed on the Mayflower in 1620. He died during the first winter at Plymouth Colony, but his son Joseph survived and married, and was later joined in MA by his brother John. This name was subsequently brought to North America independently by many different bearers.

variants.name: Roger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alcee, Armand, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Yves, Clovis, Fernand, Gilberte, Janvier, Jean Claude.

Scottish, English, North German, French, Walloon, Catalan, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hrōd ‘renown’ +gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, which was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rog(i)er and was reinforced by the Old Norse cognate Hróthgeirr.

History: Gabriel Roger from Sainte-Verge in Deux-Sèvres, France, married Marie (de) Lacour in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Rodgers
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rogers  .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Rogers was born in 1592, in Wigan, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Knight Richard Rogers II, was 20 and her mother, Sarah Barton, was 22. She married Roger Crooke in 1618, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 21 August 1644, in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Rogers est née en 1592, à Wigan, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Knight Richard Rogers II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sarah Barton, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Crooke en 1618, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 août 1644, à Blendon, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Rogers 1592 in Wigan, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Knight Richard Rogers II 20 und ihre Mutter Sarah Barton 22. Sie hat 1618 in London, England Roger Crooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. August 1644 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Hammersmith, Hammersmith and Fulham, Lon: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 해머스미스 앤드 프함 해머스미스
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Rogers(이)가 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 위건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Knight Richard Rogers II(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Barton(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1618년 영국 런던에서 Roger Crooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1644년 8월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 블렌던에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Roger Crooke em 1618, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.Hammersmith, Hammersmith and Fulham, Lon: хаммирсмит, хаммирсмит анд фьулхам, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Rogers родилась в 1592 г. в местности виган, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Knight Richard Rogers II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Barton, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Crooke в 1618 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 21 августа 1644 г. в местности блендон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.
